title: selaginella kaernbachii
intro: Selaginella kaernbachii, also known as Spikemoss or Spike Moss, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Selaginella kaernbachii is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions.
